projects.name: Discourse Integrated Dravidian language to Dravidian language machine translation
projects.description: Develop and deploy Tamil-Telugu neural MT including discourse analysis and integrate in speech to speech MT. Create annotated data for POS, syntactic & semantic parsing and discourse markers. Use Machine Learning techniques in building tools such as POS tagger, parser, discourse analyser and integrate them in a neural MT. Software used: Python, Perl, C, Web-based tools.
projects.funding: Funded by MEITY, Govt. of India (Rs. 140.19 Lakhs). Collaborators: AUKBC-Chennai, IIIT-Hyd, ICFOSS Trivandrum, MIT-Manipal, C-DAC Noida, DAIICT Gandhinagar

projects.name: Sanskrit to Indian Language Machine Translation cum Language Accessor
projects.description: Develop Sanskrit-Telugu and Sanskrit-Marathi transfer-based machine translation. Provide access to linguistic analysis to the readers to decipher the meaning of source language.
projects.funding: Funded by Indian Knowledge System, Department of Higher Education, Govt. of India

projects.name: Syntactic Parser for Tamil: A Data-driven Approach
projects.description: Annotate 100K tokens in Tamil for POS, Morph and dependency relations. Build a machine learning model for Tamil parser.
projects.funding: Funded by Tamil Virtual Academy, Govt. of Tamilnadu

projects.name: Sanskrit Knowledge Accessor
projects.description: Develop and deploy Sanskrit-Tamil hybrid (transfer+neural) MT. Build high quality linguistically rich annotated data needed for Machine Learning techniques. Integrate MT in dialogue modelling.
projects.funding: Funded by MEITY, Govt. of India. Collaborators: UoH-DSS, IIT-KGP, IIT-Kanpur, MAHE, CVV, IGDTUW

projects.name: Speech to Speech Machine Translation (SSMT): Pilot System
projects.description: Built web-based SSMT API for Tamil-Telugu MT. Compiled a huge parallel corpora and domain dictionaries for building neural MT.

projects.name: Indian Language to Indian Language Machine Translation (IL-IL MT)
projects.description: IL-IL MT is a bidirectional Indian language to Indian language machine translation project developing 18 MT systems involving 9 Indian language pairs based on transfer approach. Consortium involving IIIT Hyderabad, University of Hyderabad, IIT Bombay, IIT Kharagpur, IISc Bangalore, Anna University, and C-DAC Pune. Dr. Parameswari contributed to building Transfer Grammars, Tamil Morphological Analyser & Generator, POS tagger, Chunker, Dependency parser, Multi Word Expression & Agreement Generation modules for Tamil and Telugu.
projects.funding: Funded under Technology Development for Indian Languages (TDIL) Program by DeitY, MCIT, Government of India

projects.name: Building Shallow Parser tools, Ontological Lexicon and Full Parser for Tamil
projects.description: Building Shallow Parser tools, Ontological Lexicon and Full Parser for Tamil.
projects.funding: Funded by University Grants Commission, Delhi under UGC-SAP DSA-1
